meaning: n.放古董的架子,不可名状的东西(或人)
examples: It's a new firm. They make toys and whatnot.
The women were there in their jeans and T-shirts and whatnot.
The council can send messages or letters or whatnot in Spanish to their constituents.
Meanwhile, the white reporters were still there, the photographers and whatnot was still there to do their jobs.
Whatever the reason, that thing out there, with the black holes and the nebulae and whatnot, is conscious.
